title: LEGO Universe
description: Tyler's first video game score — recorded with the Slovak National Symphony Orchestra at Slovak Radio Concert Hall via live video link from Los Angeles.
accolades: IFMCA Award nom. — Best Score for Video Game or Interactive Media

title: Need for Speed: The Run
description: Action racing score — Tyler was brought in as primary composer reflecting his established association with the Fast & Furious franchise's driving energy.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3
description: Large-scale military action score for one of the highest-selling video games at its release — Tyler brought his blockbuster orchestral language to the franchise.
accolades: One of the highest-selling games at time of release

title: Far Cry 3
description: Open-world action-adventure score — atmospheric and kinetic writing across a tropical island setting.
accolades: BAFTA Games Award nom. — Audio Achievement 2013

title: Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag
description: Pirate-era open world score — orchestral with nautical and period-appropriate flavouring across the Caribbean setting.

title: Formula 1 Official Theme
description: Commissioned by Formula One Group — also adopted for Formula 2 and Formula 3. Recorded with the London Philharmonic Orchestra at Air Studios London.
notes: Heard at every F1 race broadcast worldwide

title: Marvel Studios Logo Fanfare
description: Tyler composed the iconic 'drum roll + brass stab' ident used at the opening of all MCU films 2013–2016. Debuted with Thor: The Dark World.

title: Universal Pictures Fanfare (100th Anniversary)
description: Tyler re-arranged Jerry Goldsmith's original Universal fanfare for Universal's 100th anniversary — debuted with The Lorax (2012).
